ir_plan.summary: Memory route-report executes generated operation IR through codegen-owned primitive dataflow. The generated Python runtime projection builds the non-verbose JSON tiny route snapshot from target-local files and falls back to the package-domain route report source for verbose/text behavior.

proof: operation command parity checks agentic-memory live parser

reads.surface: verbose flag for broad diagnostic output

steps.description: Load package-local memory routing aggregate state.

summary: Show a compact aggregate memory routing snapshot from checked-in feedback cases and fixtures; non-verbose JSON uses generated target-file checks while verbose/text behavior remains on the explicit source fallback.
